description_long: This is a two-tiered wooden cabinet or shelf with a rectangular shape, featuring a pair of hinged doors at the bottom section and two open shelves above. The top and middle shelves are supported by four cylindrical vertical posts, and the cabinet stands on four short legs. The open shelves display a variety of items, including several books of different colors and sizes, as well as two small potted plants. The cabinet doors have simple, triangular handles, suggesting easy access to the lower storage compartment. The overall color scheme is a combination of mustard yellow for the shelves and doors, with dark brown posts and legs, giving it a modern yet functional appearance. This piece would be suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, waiting areas, or residential entryways.
description: A modern, two-tiered wooden cabinet with open shelves displaying books and potted plants, and a closed lower compartment with handles. The design features mustard yellow surfaces and dark brown supports.
description_view_0: Front view showing both open shelves with books and plants, and the closed lower compartment with two handles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the vertical posts, with a blue book visible at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back panels of the cabinet and the arrangement of books and plants from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the potted plants and the blue book on the lower shelf.
